response.justification: Aisha brings over 15 years of software development experience, significantly exceeding the 6-year requirement, with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Java. Her recent work directly addressing AI-agent infrastructure, combined with a strong background in software craftsmanship, TDD, and cloud deployments, makes her an exceptionally strong fit for this role, despite lacking explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest.
strengths: Extensive full-stack expertise with the primary TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack
Recent, highly relevant experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tools
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and robust testing practices
concerns: Highly senior background (Staff/Founder) may make her overqualified for a mid-senior role
Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest/Jest, requiring minor framework onboarding
Significant past focus on niche technologies (DLang, Ember.js) alongside core stack
